mapper.sql: select a.id, a.contract_id, a.account_name, a.account_date, a.amount, a.amount_type, a.order_no, a.our_party, a.other_party, a.related_contract_name, a.related_contract_number, a.remark, a.status, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.direct_leader, a.approver, a.handler, a.current_approval_node, c.owner, c.attachments, c.other_party_name as supplier_name from contract_account a left join biz_contract_content c on a.contract_id = c.id

where.if: and (a.our_party like concat('%', #{partyName}, '%') or a.other_party like concat('%', #{partyName}, '%'))

if.test: warningType != null and warningType != '' and warningType != 'all'

choose.when: and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and a.account_date < CURDATE()
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and a.account_date < CURDATE()
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) between 1 and 3
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) between 1 and 3
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) between 4 and 7
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) between 4 and 7
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) between 8 and 30
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) between 8 and 30
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) > 30
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), a.account_date) > 30
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and a.account_date = CURDATE()
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and a.account_date = CURDATE()
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) = 1
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) = 1
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 2 and 3
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 2 and 3
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 4 and 7
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 4 and 7
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 8 and 15
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 8 and 15
and a.amount_type = 'income' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 16 and 30
and a.amount_type = 'expense' and (a.status is null or a.status != 'done') and DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) between 16 and 30
and ((a.status = 'done') or a.account_date is null or DATEDIFF(a.account_date, CURDATE()) > 30)

mapper.insert:
insert into contract_account
contract_id, account_name, account_date, amount, amount_type, order_no, our_party, other_party, related_contract_name, related_contract_number, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, direct_leader, approver, handler, current_approval_node,
#{contractId}, #{accountName}, #{accountDate}, #{amount}, #{amountType}, #{orderNo}, #{ourParty}, #{otherParty}, #{relatedContractName}, #{relatedContractNumber}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{directLeader}, #{approver}, #{handler}, #{currentApprovalNode},
mapper.delete:
delete from contract_account where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into contract_account (contract_id, account_name, account_date, amount, amount_type, order_no, our_party, other_party, related_contract_name, related_contract_number, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, direct_leader, approver, handler, current_approval_node) values
(#{item.contractId}, #{item.accountName}, #{item.accountDate}, #{item.amount}, #{item.amountType}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.ourParty}, #{item.otherParty}, #{item.relatedContractName}, #{item.relatedContractNumber}, #{item.remark}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.directLeader}, #{item.approver}, #{item.handler}, #{item.currentApprovalNode})
